title: OpenTelemetry Trace Examples
description: Closed schema for artifacts/misc/trace-examples.json. Captures real W3C trace IDs from actual LeadRoutingService.routeLead invocations (IFC-032 ADR-017 requirement). Trace IDs are generated by the OpenTelemetry SDK's RandomIdGenerator and must match the W3C trace-context specification (32 hex chars for trace_id, 16 hex chars for span_id).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the trace examples were captured

source.description: Path to the script that produced this artifact (must be a real script in tools/scripts/observability/)

task_id.description: Originating task ID (IFC-032 for the initial capture)

exporter.description: Name of the OTel exporter used (e.g., InMemorySpanExporter for hermetic capture, or otlp-http for live)

examples.description: Array of captured trace samples — must contain at least one entry; gate real-trace-data requires at least 3.

scenario.description: Human-readable label identifying the routing scenario

trace_id.description: W3C-format trace ID — 32 lowercase hex characters generated by the OTel RandomIdGenerator

span_id.description: W3C-format parent span ID — 16 lowercase hex characters

workflow_id.description: Workflow correlation ID generated at routeLead entry. UUID v7 (or v4) — used for cross-span correlation per ADR-017 §3

route_id.description: Matched routing-rule ID, or literal 'rule:none' for fallback strategies

lead_id.description: Lead UUID used for the captured invocation

tenant_id.description: Tenant UUID used for the captured invocation

routing_method.description: Routing strategy that produced the assignment (matches IFC-030 ROUTING_REASONS values: rule_match | skill_match | load_balance | no_eligible_agent)

routing_score.description: Numeric score of the winning agent (or 0 when no eligible agent)

status.description: Span status code per OTel SemConv

child_span_names.description: Optional list of child span names captured under this trace (used by integration evidence)
